title: andropogon cymbarius var. lepidus
intro: Andropogon cymbarius var. lepidus, also known as the Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Andropogon cymbarius var. lepidus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
